narrative_beat: O profeta solitário no fim — não derrotado mas vigilante, portando a mensagem que a maioria não quer ouvir, a luz no peito contra a escuridão apocalíptica

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: slightly below eye-level looking up at figure from behind at 3/4 angle
shot.depth_of_field: figure sharp, vast horizon background progressively blurred

subject.primary: solitary prophet figure in crimson and gold robes standing at the edge of a rocky cliff, looking outward toward a vast dark horizon
subject.focal_point: the golden light emanating from the prophet's chest, and the ancient scroll held in one raised hand
subject.secondary: distant city lights flickering at the horizon under a dark apocalyptic sky
props: ancient parchment scroll raised in one hand
golden light emanating from chest center
floating orange embers drifting upward from robes

environment.location: rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast panorama
environment.time_of_day: deep night, apocalyptic sky with unnatural darkness
environment.atmosphere: the lone voice in the wilderness — still standing, still warning, still carrying light into the dark

composition.rule: rule of thirds — figure on right third, vast dark horizon on left two-thirds, Ken Burns very slow pull-back to reveal the scale of the darkness ahead
composition.foreground: prophet figure in crimson and gold, chest light and scroll as focal elements
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white vast dark panorama — horizon line, distant city light clusters barely visible, apocalyptic cloud formations in dark sky

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from behind-right catching the edge of prophet's robes and face profile
lighting.fill_light: golden chest light providing forward-fill on prophet's facing surface
lighting.rim_light: strong golden rim along back and shoulder from the light source behind
lighting.mood: prophetic solitude, the weight of truth no one wants to hear, and the refusal to stay silent

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: solemn determination, the prophet's calling fulfilled regardless of audience, the final call to attention

symbolism.primary: the solitary prophet represents the prophetic voice in the modern age — isolated but carrying genuine light against the digital darkness
symbolism.secondary: the flickering distant city lights represent civilization at the edge of the prophesied collapse — still there, barely, for now

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
